taskTemplate.name: Closing Document Quality Assurance
taskTemplate.description: Quality assurance review of executed closing documents

subTaskTemplate.name: Check Notary Sections
subTaskTemplate.description: Check Notary Sections – Check the notary sections on all wet sign documents.
subTaskTemplate.type: Closing Document Quality Assurance – Check Notary Sections

subTaskTemplate.name: Verify Signatures
subTaskTemplate.description: Verify Signatures – Verify documents are signed properly.
subTaskTemplate.type: Closing Document Quality Assurance – Verify Signatures

subTaskTemplate.name: Confirm Addendums Witnessed
subTaskTemplate.description: Confirm Addendums Witnessed – Confirm addendums are witnessed.
subTaskTemplate.type: Closing Document Quality Assurance – Confirm Addendums Witnessed

subTaskTemplate.name: Ensure CIP Complete
subTaskTemplate.description: Ensure CIP Complete – Ensure the Customer Identification Program (CIP) is complete.
subTaskTemplate.type: Closing Document Quality Assurance – Ensure CIP Complete
